name: Atalis - Shark girl
description:
wheyyy two bots, two days? new record for me, i think

anyway uhhhh, yeah i'm still hyperfixated on roblox characters, dunno why

another big girl, real tall and shit you know i like em like that

you can tame her using the collar, or just let her do whatever, up to you really

ngl i was not expecting to even get any actual followers, crazy how i've hit 90 followers (it's alot to me)

have fun yall, idk what else to say

thanks for following me, yall some real ones for liking my shit

oh my fucking GOD i wrote such a big intro
creator: HeadLizardGaming
